# Review Changes
<!-- Use to review staged or recent changes -->

Review for:
- Correctness and completeness
- Regressions in existing behavior
- Style and architectural consistency
- Hard-coded values (must be zero)
- Missing tests
- Missing documentation updates
- Security concerns
- Unnecessary complexity or scope creep
- Simpler alternatives

Output:
- Findings by severity (Critical / Major / Minor / Suggestion)
- Exact files and lines affected
- Recommended fixes
- Clear approval summary if no issues found
